# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

type QueryParams = Record<string, string>;

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200, headers: HeadersInit = {}) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...headers,
    },
  });
}

function parseQuery(url: URL): QueryParams {
  const params: QueryParams = {};
  for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    params[key] = value;
  }
  return params;
}

function normalizeValue(value: string): string | number | boolean {
  if (value === "true") return true;
  if (value === "false") return false;
  if (value !== "" && !Number.isNaN(Number(value)) && /^[+-]?(?:\d+\.?\d*|\.\d+)$/.test(value)) {
    return Number(value);
  }
  return value;
}

function buildKeySegments(params: QueryParams): Deno.KvKey {
  const userId = params.userId ?? params.id ?? "all";
  const filterParam = params.filter ?? params.field ?? params.status ?? "all";
  return ["users", userId, filterParam];
}

function buildPrefix(params: QueryParams): Deno.KvKey {
  const userId = params.userId ?? params.id;
  const filterParam = params.filter ?? params.field ?? params.status;

  if (userId && filterParam) return ["users", userId, filterParam];
  if (userId) return ["users", userId];
  return ["users"];
}

async function handleSearch(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = parseQuery(url);

  const prefix = buildPrefix(params);
  const limit = Math.min(Math.max(Number(params.limit ?? 100), 1), 1000);
  const cursor = params.cursor || undefined;

  const entries: Array<{ key: Deno.KvKey; value: unknown; versionstamp: string | null }> = [];

  for await (const entry of kv.list({ prefix }, { limit, cursor })) {
    entries.push({
      key: entry.key,
      value: entry.value,
      versionstamp: entry.versionstamp,
    });
  }

  const filters = Object.entries(params).filter(
    ([k]) => !["userId", "id", "filter", "field", "status", "limit", "cursor"].includes(k),
  );

  const filtered = filters.length
    ? entries.filter((entry) => {
        const value = entry.value as Record<string, unknown> | unknown;
        if (typeof value !== "object" || value === null) return false;
        return filters.every(([k, v]) => {
          const actual = (value as Record<string, unknown>)[k];
          return String(actual) === String(normalizeValue(v));
        });
      })
    : entries;

  return jsonResponse({
    ok: true,
    prefix,
    query: params,
    count: filtered.length,
    results: filtered,
  });
}

async function handleGet(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = parseQuery(url);
  const key = buildKeySegments(params);
  const result = await kv.get(key);

  return jsonResponse({
    ok: true,
    key,
    found: result.versionstamp !== null,
    value: result.value,
    versionstamp: result.versionstamp,
  });
}

async function handlePut(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = parseQuery(url);
  const key = buildKeySegments(params);

  let body: unknown = null;
  try {
    body = await req.json();
  } catch {
    body = {};
  }

  const value = {
    ...(typeof body === "object" && body !== null ? body as Record<string, unknown> : {}),
    ...Object.fromEntries(
      Object.entries(params).map(([k, v]) => [k, normalizeValue(v)]),
    ),
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  };

  await kv.set(key, value);

  return jsonResponse({
    ok: true,
    key,
    value,
  }, 201);
}

async function handleDelete(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = parseQuery(url);
  const key = buildKeySegments(params);

  await kv.delete(key);

  return jsonResponse({
    ok: true,
    key,
    deleted: true,
  });
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return jsonResponse({ ok: true });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/search" && req.method === "GET") {
    return handleSearch(req);
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/user" && req.method === "GET") {
    return handleGet(req);
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/user" && req.method === "POST") {
    return handlePut(req);
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/user" && req.method === "DELETE") {
    return handleDelete(req);
  }

  return jsonResponse(
    {
      ok: false,
      error: "Not Found",
      routes: {
        GET: ["/health", "/search", "/user"],
        POST: ["/user"],
        DELETE: ["/user"],
      },
    },
    404,
  );
});
